message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam noteStyle rectangle
skinparam actorStyle awesome

actor User
participant "Application" as App
participant "<<engine>>\nAuto SDK Engine" as Engine
participant "<<avs>>\nAlexa" as Alexa

User -> Alexa: "Turn off AC"
activate Alexa
Alexa -> Engine: PowerController.TurnOff directive
activate Engine
Engine -> App: Receive SetPowerControllerValue message
activate App
App -> App: Turn off AC
App -> Engine: Publish SetControllerValueMessage Reply
deactivate App
Engine -> Alexa: Alexa.Response event
deactivate Engine
deactivate Alexa
note right of Engine: SpeechSynthesizer.Speak directive\n<<Alexa speech response>>
Alexa -> App: 
deactivate Alexa

@enduml
